scripts.api:dev: kill -9 $(lsof -t -i:8000) 2>/dev/null || true; cd apps/api && (python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --reload-dir app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 || python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --reload-dir app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000)
scripts.api:run: kill -9 $(lsof -t -i:8000) 2>/dev/null || true; cd apps/api && (python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 || python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000)
scripts.api:install: cd apps/api && (python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt || python -m pip install -r requirements.txt)
